message.content:
Thoroughly explore the aisuite module in this repository. I need to understand:
1. The complete directory structure of the aisuite module
2. All Go source files and their purposes
3. Key types, interfaces, and data structures
4. The overall architecture and how components interact
5. External dependencies and integrations

Start by finding all files related to aisuite (search broadly), then read each source file to understand the logic. Be very thorough - read every Go file in the aisuite module.
